title: croton alnifolius var. genuinus
intro: Croton alnifolius var. genuinus is a plant species in the Euphorbiaceae family, commonly known as the Ceylon croton, native to Sri Lanka. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, obtained from its leaves and roots. The health benefits of Croton alnifolius var. genuinus include its potential in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, which can be taken internally or applied topically to utilize its medicinal properties.
